overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a dystopian neon-lit city. The player navigates narrow alleys, bustling market streets, open plazas, and underpasses while encountering various NPCs and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with storefronts and sex workers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow cyberpunk alley, passing NPCs standing near building entrances

notable_agents.action: two women in revealing clothing standing near a doorway, one gesturing

entered.detail: building facade with vertical pink neon tube lighting and dark entrance
building with illuminated green grid-patterned windows and teal signage
large blue neon sign with 'HOTEL' visible in the distance
wooden park bench with a seated NPC resting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a tight cyberpunk alleyway bathed in pink and cyan neon light. The player walks forward past NPCs gathered near doorways, with a distinctive green-lit building on the left and a pink neon storefront on the right. A hotel sign glows in the distance at the alley's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with food vendors and vending machines

events.description: passing from narrow residential alley into wider commercial market street with illuminated stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through a moderately crowded market area, passing food stalls and vending machines on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright cyan pants and green hair walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: small food vendor stall with illuminated menu display and striped awning
automated vending machine structure with glowing product displays
floating holographic advertisement above the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider market street with moderate foot traffic. Food stalls and vending machines line the right side while various pedestrians walk in the same direction. A distinctive character in cyan pants walks ahead, and holographic advertisements float above the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with grand stairs and graffiti-covered barriers

events.description: emerging from covered market street into open plaza with large stair structure and visible sky
ascending wide concrete stairs toward the upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking up wide stairs in a large plaza, passing other pedestrians and street vendors

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading to upper level with metal railings
concrete barrier with large white 'REGRETS' graffiti text
multi-story cylindrical building with curved balconies and red lighting

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a spacious urban plaza featuring a grand staircase leading upward. A prominent concrete barrier displays 'REGRETS' in large graffiti letters. The player ascends the stairs toward a tall circular building while the density of neon signage increases around the plaza perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass and industrial back alley with construction debris

events.description: descending from open plaza into covered underpass with industrial lighting and metal fencing
ambient lighting shifts from blue-green to red-orange hue in the deeper alley section

agents.ego_description: walking down into a darker underpass area, navigating around construction materials and debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white hat and tan jacket walking ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: covered concrete walkway beneath highway structure with support pillars
metal scaffolding and construction materials stacked along the wall
large industrial dumpster illuminated by red emergency lighting

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the plaza into a dimly lit underpass beneath a highway overpass. The environment becomes industrial with scaffolding, construction debris, and trash bins. Lighting shifts to a red-orange hue deeper in the alley, creating a more ominous atmosphere as the player follows an NPC in a white hat.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection beneath overpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting dark underpass back to street level with visible vehicle traffic and traffic signals
waiting at crosswalk for several cars to pass before crossing the street

agents.ego_description: approaching a crosswalk under an overpass, waiting for traffic to clear, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning the intersection
traffic signal showing green light with street sign attached
yellow and black striped pedestrian crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The final segment emerges from the underpass into a city street intersection beneath a massive highway overpass. The player approaches a crosswalk, waits for passing vehicles including a dark sedan, then begins crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crossing as traffic lights glow green in the cyberpunk night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic neon alleyway into a wide, open urban plaza. It begins by navigating a tight corridor bathed in pink and cyan light, passing NPCs and glowing storefronts toward a distant hotel sign. As the camera moves forward, the alley opens into a bustling market street where the space expands to reveal food stalls, holographic advertisements, and pedestrians moving through the neon glow. The scene then shifts into a spacious plaza, passing a concrete barrier marked with large REGRETS graffiti before turning toward a grand staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs toward a tall circular building as the surrounding density of neon signage intensifies.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an open plaza into a gritty industrial underpass before emerging back into the neon-lit city traffic. It begins by dipping beneath a highway overpass, where the surroundings shift into a dimly lit corridor filled with scaffolding, construction debris, and trash bins. As the camera follows an NPC in a white hat deeper into the alley, the lighting transitions to an ominous red-orange hue. The scene then opens up as the player exits the underpass and reaches a city street intersection beneath the massive concrete structure of the highway. Finally, the camera approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk, pausing for a dark sedan to pass before crossing the street under the glow of green traffic lights.
